headline: Claude surges past rivals despite volatile energy sector bets
summary: Claude dominated the week with a 2.54 score, landing spectacular calls on META and QQQ while stumbling on oil plays. Grok maintained steady performance with consistent SPY and AAPL wins, while Perplexity struggled with bearish bias early in the week. GPT-4o showed mixed results, particularly struggling with its overly optimistic TSLA targets.

best_call.summary: Claude perfectly nailed QQQ's surge to 606 with 85% confidence, achieving 99.4% target accuracy.

worst_call.summary: Claude's 90% confidence DAL bullish call backfired as the airline stock declined instead.
